name_cn:

In stock!!️
Montaigne 30 🥳 Let's encounter this timeless elegance 💝. The sharp silhouette and retro design 💫 are very noble and elegant 🎉. The lock design is also very clever; it feels very high-quality whether worn crossbody or on one shoulder ❤️
